nasb.text: He will cover you with His pinions, And under His wings you may seek refuge; His faithfulness is a shield and bulwark.

esv.text: He will cover you with his pinions, and under his wings you will find refuge; his faithfulness is a shield and buckler.

cnv.text: 他必用自己的羽毛遮蓋你， 你要投靠在他的翅膀底下； 他的信實像盾牌，像堅壘。

ccb.text: 祂必用祂的羽毛遮盖你， 用祂的双翼保护你， 祂的信实是你的盾牌和壁垒。

csbs.text: 他必用自己的羽翼遮盖你， 你要投靠在他的翅膀底下； 他的信实是盾牌和壁垒。
